title: The Keys to Robin’s Rescue: Key Exchange
description: In the Enies Lobby Climax storyline, this section centers on CP9, Unknown person #1, Nami, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13, Spandam as the scene develops across pages 19–22.
scene: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through CP9, Unknown person #1, Nami, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13, focusing on the immediate stakes of the keys to robin’s rescue: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: CP9
dialogue.text: But unfortunately, we have to evacuate quickly.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's the same attack sanji-kun received...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ugh!! I can't hold Clima tact well.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What did you turn my body into!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's useless. Fun time is over.
